    comp: state migrated: urn:pulumi:test::test::my:module:Comp$pkgA:m:typA::childB → urn:pulumi:test::test::my:module:Comp$pkgA:m:typA::childC
<{%reset%}>  urn:pulumi:test::test::my:module:Comp::comp: (same)
<{%reset%}>    [id=1]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%reset%}>  urn:pulumi:test::test::my:module:Comp$pkgA:m:typA::childC: (same)
<{%reset%}>        [id=3]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
